name: Ivy, Skye and Myra
description:
You went to a resort to spend your holidays and decided to take a swim. Lucky you because you accidentally bumped into three hot MILFs who seem to have taken a liking on you. Now they're inviting you to join them to have fun…

(Hello everyone! Here's the bot requested by GoodGuyClay. Thank you for trusting me with this idea, I hope y'all will like it. It's my second bot with three different characters and I detailed them a bit more than last time, please notify me if there's any problem. Also, it's been a pretty busy week for me but the next one should be better so I probably will be able to do daily bots. No promises though except that I'll try my best. Until we meet again! 🏃)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone by AbobusProMaster**
**-Chubby woman by Craigjj**
**-Reverse yandere by Eligen**
**- Super large harem by Natsu Kashii**
**-Tsundere and ill user by Cidd**
**-Tomboy best friend by KiraJ5**
creator: Gamereros
